---
title: "Your Project Title"
image: "/listing-grid/banners/2024-example-project.png"  # CHANGE: update folder name
author:
  - name: "[Your Name](https://yourdomain.com)"          # CHANGE
  - name: "[Collaborator](https://collaborator.com)"     # CHANGE or remove
date: "Jan, 2024"
categories: [Category1, Category2]
description: "A one-sentence description of this project."
---

::: {.d-flex .justify-content-center .flex-wrap .text-center}
[<i class="bi bi-browser-safari"></i> Website](https://yourproject.com){.btn .btn-primary .m-1 style="width: 120px;"}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/yourgithub/yourproject){.btn .btn-primary .m-1 style="width: 120px;"}
:::

## Overview

Describe your project here. What problem does it solve? What is the approach?

## Methods

Explain your methodology.

## Results

Summarize key findings or outputs.
